info.name: SSCentral - In-Game API
info.description:
## SSCentral – In-Game API

This collection contains the full suite of test cases for the **SSCentral In-Game API** — the backend API used by the _**FiveSteps: Rhythm Game**_ client to interact with the _**SSCentral**_ platform. It covers player authentication, song discovery, voting, hash verification, song downloading, and community pack browsing.

### Folders

| # | Folder | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 00 | **Player Authentication** | Handles Firebase-based player login, providing the JWT token used to authenticate subsequent requests. |
| 01 | **Song Discovery** | Tests the song discovery endpoint across a wide range of scenarios: default queries, filtering by ID, text search, pagination parameters, and edge cases such as unapproved songs or non-existent IDs. |
| 02 | **Voting** | Covers the song voting system, including casting votes, handling duplicate votes, voting on unapproved or non-existent songs, and authentication enforcement. |
| 03 | **Hash Verification** | Validates the chart/SSC hash verification endpoint, testing approved and unapproved hashes, hashes from unapproved packs, non-existent hashes, and authentication edge cases. |
| 04 | **Song Download** | Tests song download endpoints, including valid downloads, unapproved content, non-existent songs, and authentication requirements. |
| 05 | **HUB & Community Packs** | Tests endpoints related to browsing HUB-featured and community-submitted song packs, including approved and unapproved pack scenarios. |

### Environment

All requests are designed to run against the `SSCENTRAL-LOCAL` environment, which provides variables such as `base_url`, `FIREBASE_API_KEY`, player credentials, and pre-seeded song/pack/hash IDs for consistent and repeatable test execution.

item.description:
Handles player authentication for the FiveSteps: Rhythm Game client via Firebase.

This folder contains the login request that authenticates a player using their email and password against the Firebase Identity Toolkit. On success, it captures and stores the JWT token returned by Firebase, which is then used as a Bearer token to authorize all subsequent requests in this collection.

**Endpoint used:** `POST https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signInWithPassword`

item.description:
Tests the song discovery endpoint (`GET /api/v2/songs/discover`) across a comprehensive range of scenarios to ensure correct behavior under all expected and edge-case conditions.

**Coverage includes:**

- **Default queries** – Authenticated and unauthenticated requests with no parameters (TC-A01, TC-A02, TC-A26)
    
- **ID-based lookup** – Fetching songs by valid ID, non-existent ID, unapproved song ID, and songs belonging to unapproved packs (TC-A03 to TC-A06)
    
- **Text search** – Keyword matching, non-matching keywords, combined query + ID, whitespace-only input, and SQL wildcard/injection defense (TC-A07 to TC-A09, TC-A23 to TC-A25)
    
- **Pagination** – Negative, non-numeric, out-of-bounds, and excessive limit/page values (TC-A10 to TC-A12, TC-A18, TC-A19)
    
- **Sorting & filtering** – Sorting by plays, downloads, likes, modified date, and upload date across various time windows (weekly, monthly, 6-month, yearly, all-time) with ascending/descending order (TC-A13 to TC-A17)
    
- **Invalid parameters** – Unsupported sort fields, invalid order values, and unsupported time window values (TC-A20 to TC-A22)
    

**Endpoint:** `GET {{base_url}}/api/v2/songs/discover`

item.description:
This folder contains all test cases related to the **Song Voting** feature of the In-Game API (`/api/v2/songs/:id/vote`).

It covers the full voting lifecycle and edge cases, organized into two main areas:

**Vote Submission (POST)**

- Registering a positive (`like`) vote on an approved song
    
- Handling duplicate vote attempts
    
- Switching an existing vote to `dislike`
    
- Removing / cancelling an active vote (unvote)
    
- Validation of invalid or missing vote action parameters
    

**Vote Retrieval (GET)**

- Fetching a user's active vote record for a song
    
- Retrieving a vote record for a non-existent song
    
- Retrieving vote records for unapproved songs and songs in unapproved packs
    

**Authorization & Access Control**

- Voting without authentication (no JWT)
    
- Voting with an invalid JWT token
    
- Voting on non-existent song IDs
    
- Voting on unapproved songs or songs belonging to unapproved packs

item.description:
This folder covers test cases for the **Song Charts & Hash Verification** endpoints of the SSCentral In-Game API.

It is split into two areas:

**1\. Song Charts (****`GET /api/v2/songs/:id/charts`****)**  
Validates retrieval of chart and difficulty level data for a given song. Tests cover:

- Successful retrieval for an approved song
    
- Edge cases: non-existent song ID, unapproved song, song belonging to an unapproved pack
    
- Authentication edge cases: missing JWT, invalid JWT
    

**2\. Chart Hash Verification (****`POST /api/songs/:id/verify-chart-hash`****)**  
Validates the SSC and chart hash verification mechanism used to confirm file integrity. Tests cover:

- Successful verification of matching SSC and chart hashes
    
- Partial hash mismatches (valid SSC + invalid chart hash, and vice versa)
    
- Songs in unapproved or pending states
    
- Authentication and authorization edge cases: missing auth, invalid JWT, missing service key header, invalid service key header

item.description:
This folder contains test cases for the **Song Download** feature, specifically targeting the `/api/download` endpoint. It validates the generation of secure asset download URLs and covers a range of authentication and authorization scenarios, including:

- **TC-D01** – Successful generation of a secure download URL for an approved song by an authenticated user.
- **TC-D02** – Rejection of requests made with an invalid JWT token.
- **TC-D03** – Rejection of requests made without any authentication.
- **TC-D04** – Handling of download requests for non-existent songs.
- **TC-D05** – Handling of download requests for songs that have not been approved.
- **TC-D06** – Handling of download requests for songs belonging to an unapproved pack.

Together, these tests ensure that the download endpoint correctly enforces authentication, authorization, and content availability rules before issuing a download link.

item.description:
This folder contains test cases for the **HUB Feed** and **Community Song Packs** features of the SSCentral In-Game API.

It covers two endpoints:

**1\. HUB Feed (****`GET /api/v2/hub`****)**  
Validates retrieval of the HUB activity feed. Tests cover:

- Fetching the feed without authentication (TC-E01)
    

**2\. Community Song Packs (****`GET /api/v2/packs/all`****)**  
Validates listing and browsing of all community-submitted song packs. Tests cover:

- Default retrieval of all packs (TC-E02)
    
- Pagination — standard page navigation, out-of-bounds page index, and invalid negative page values (TC-E03 to TC-E05)
    
- Unauthenticated access to the packs listing (TC-E06)
    

Together, these tests ensure that the HUB feed and community pack browsing endpoints handle both normal usage and edge cases correctly, including authentication enforcement and pagination boundary conditions.
